resources.string: You're dead. Finish your tasks to win.
You're dead. You can still sabotage.
Among Us is a game of teamwork and betrayal.\%nl\%\%nl\%Players are either Crewmates or an Impostor.
Play with 4 to 15 players online or via local WiFi!
If you already have an Among Us account on another platform, you may be able to link to that account! Alternatively, you can create a brand new account.

Firstly, determine who you want to play with!\%nl\%\%nl\%If you want to play with friends online, set to "private" and share the room code.\%nl\%\%nl\%If you want to play with others from all around the world, set to "public".
Want to play with more tasks? How about faster walk speed? More Impostors? As host, you can change these settings. Be sure to confirm the changes with your fellow players.
If someone is being rude and/or spamming, hosts can temporarily kick players as a warning or ban players from the specific online room.
Players have access to a personal map to help them navigate the ship.
Objective: Fill Group Task Bar or Discover the Impostor.
Call emergency meeting when Impostor found.
Check Admin Map and Security for suspicious activity.
Sabotage the ship and confuse the Crew.
Kill off the Crew between cooldowns.

While playing in person, no talking is allowed to keep the game fair between The Crew and The Impostor.\%nl\%\%nl\%If a player is killed by The Impostor, they cannot talk until the game ends.\%nl\%\%nl\%Ghosts still run their assigned tasks working towards a possible Crewmates win.

When someone reports a dead body or calls an emergency meeting, the Crew gathers to discuss what they know about the Impostor.\%nl\%\%nl\%Players can now talk openly about who they think the Impostor is and what information they have. When playing in person, Ghosts cannot talk as they already know who the Impostor is.\%nl\%\%nl\%Impostors will try to prove their innocence or accuse another crew member.

After discussion, vote for who you think is the Impostor.\%nl\%\%nl\%Whoever gets majority votes will be ejected from the ship, so vote wisely!\%nl\%\%nl\%If you don't have enough information and have decided as a Crew, you can also skip voting to avoid ejecting someone innocent and gather more information.
Set your own tasks as a Crew member or practice your Impostor killing strategies!

Connection trubz?\%nl\%\%nl\%● Make sure everyone is connected to the same WiFi name\%nl\%● Make sure everyone has the same version (in the bottom right)\%nl\%● Make sure your WiFi's signal is strong\%nl\%● Sometimes another person hosting helps\%nl\%● Sometimes restarting the app helps...\%nl\%● Sometimes restarting your phone helps...\%nl\%● Still having problems? Let us know by reaching out to support@innersloth.com!

How does this work?\%nl\%\%nl\%● Hosting a game gives you a game code in the lobby panel.\%nl\%● Share the game code with friends to create a private room.\%nl\%● Or tap "Private" to make the room public for "Find Game".\%nl\%● The host can ban or kick players whenever chat is available.\%nl\%● Still having problems? Let us know by reaching out to support@innersloth.com!
EMERGENCY MEETINGS CANNOT\%nl\%BE CALLED DURING CRISES

Can we use your personal data to tailor ads for you? If you click yes, our advertising partners such as Google AdMob and Unity Ads will automatically collect data and use device identifiers and cookies for ad personalization. If you click no, you may still see non-personalized ads. To remove all ads, purchase the no-ad upgrade [httpstore]here[], and you and your friends will get no ads whenever you host! To learn more about our and our advertising partners' privacy practices, please see our [https://www.innersloth.com/privacy-policy/]Privacy Policy[]. You can change your decision at any time in the settings menu under "Data".

Innersloth processes personal data for Among Us. Please read our \%link="https://www.innersloth.com/privacy-policy/"\%Privacy Policy\%/link\% to learn more about our privacy practices. You can manage your personal data settings for Among Us under "Data".\%nl\%\%nl\%Please read our \%link="https://www.innersloth.com/terms-of-use-for-the-games/"\%Terms of Use\%/link\% before playing Among Us.
Normally The Crew would have just won because The Impostor is dead. For Practice, we revive everyone instead.
Normally The Impostor would have just won because The Crew can no longer win. For Practice, we revive everyone instead.
Normally The Crew would have just won because the task bar is full. For Practice, we issue new tasks instead.
Normally The Impostor would have just won because of the critical sabotage. Instead we just shut it off.
Play with 4 to 15 players online with your\%nl\%\%nl\%Nintendo Switch Online membership or via local Wi-Fi!!
The Among Us servers are overloaded.\%nl\%\%nl\%Sorry! Please try again later!
You may not join another game for another {0} minutes after intentionally disconnecting.
You were disconnected because Among Us was suspended by another app.
You were banned from {0}.\%nl\%\%nl\%You cannot rejoin that room.
You were kicked from {0}.\%nl\%\%nl\%You can rejoin if the room hasn't started.
You were banned from the room.\%nl\%\%nl\%You cannot rejoin that room.
You were kicked from the room.\%nl\%\%nl\%You can rejoin if the room hasn't started.
You were banned for hacking.\%nl\%\%nl\%Please stop.
The game you tried to join is full.\%nl\%\%nl\%Check with the host to see if you can join next round.
The game you tried to join already started.\%nl\%\%nl\%Check with the host to see if you can join next round.
Could not find the game you're looking for.
The game server stopped this game. Possibly due to inactivity.
You disconnected from the server.\%nl\%If this happens often, check your network strength.\%nl\%This may also be a server issue.
You disconnected from the host.\%nl\%\%nl\%If this happens often, check your WiFi strength.
An unknown error disconnected you from the server.
You are running an older version of the game.\%nl\%\%nl\%Please update to play with others.
Among Us is playable with 4 players, but 5 or more players is recommended.\%nl\%\%nl\%4 player games will end very quickly and the impostor will often win.
{0} left the game due to error.
Was this a dead body or an emergency meeting?
I saw while using the Zipline
Please enter your date of birth:
I saw {0} is dead on Vitals
I saw {0} do a visual task
Would you like to continue without saving?
Something went wrong with creating your account. Please try again later.
Could not connect to your Among Us Account.
You've successfully signed into your account!
You must wait for your Guardian to give permission for you to use Free Chat and change your username.
Don't forget to have your Guardian check their e-mail to unlock all of the game's features
Do you want to create an account?
We will need to ask your guardian (via e-mail) for permission to continue. If they say yes, you will be able to use free chat online and change your username. Ask an adult to help you with this!
You have reported the following user successfully.
Why are you reporting this user?
Something went wrong with your ability to connect to online services. Until this is fixed, you can only play Local or Practice modes. Please try again later.
You are currently not logged into an account.

Sign in or create an Among Us account to access the game's features like:\%nl\%\%nl\%- Saving your progress across select devices\%nl\%- Accessing Free Chat\%nl\%- Linking cosmetics\%nl\%- And more!\%nl\%\%nl\%Some features may need parent or guardian approval depending on the account type.
If you sign in to a full account, you can always log in again later. If you do not have an account, one will be made for you automatically.
Your in-game chat settings are set to Quick Chat Only.
You need to ask for your parent or guardian's permission to access Full Chat.
You must be signed in to change this.
You will only be able to use Quick Chat while playing, and will only play with other Quick Chat users.
Browse all items on the Nintendo eShop
There was insufficient storage space to downloaded the asset pack. Please make space on your device and try again.
A network error occurred. Please check your connection settings and try again.
Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
The Among Us servers could not authenticate you.\%nl\%\%nl\%You must have an Among Us account to play online.
Come play Among Us with me!
Please contact support@innersloth.com with any support inquiries.
Something went wrong with the current game session
Failed to get game session info
Crossplay Enabled: You may encounter cross-network players.
Sure is taking a while to sign in. Want to continue in offline mode?
The Ol' Ball Game - Light Blue
The Ol' Ball Game - Light Green
a n g e r y
Do you want to purchase the following branch on the {0}?
If you already have an Among Us account on another platform, you may be able to link to that account!\%nl\%Alternatively, you can create a brand new account.
Something went wrong with linking your account. Please try again later.

Unlinking your {0} account will wipe your data and create a new {0} account.\%nl\%- You will lose any items you've received or unlocked on your {0} account.\%nl\%- You will restart at level 1 and 0 XP.

Please save this ID for reference:\%nl\%\%nl\%{0}\%nl\%\%nl\%If you unlink your account and do not have this ID, we cannot recover your progress and will not be able to assist you if there has been a mistake.
Something went wrong with unlinking your account. Please try again later.
You have successfully unlinked {0} from your main Among Us account!

Linking to a different account will overwrite all data on this platform. This means your {0} Among Us account will be replaced by the other account.\%nl\%- Any items you've unlocked on your {0} account will be overwritten.\%nl\%- All XP earned on your {0} account will be overwritten.\%nl\%- All Beans, Pods, and Stars will be overwritten.

As soon as you confirm, we will reset your {0} Among Us account in order to prepare for importing the data from a different account.\%nl\%\%nl\%\%color=#{1}\%ENSURE YOU HAVE ANOTHER EXISTING ACCOUNT THAT YOU WOULD LIKE TO LINK THIS ACCOUNT TO BEFORE PROCESSING.\%/color\%\%nl\%\%nl\%Resetting your {0} account will clear all XP, Beans, Pods, and items to 0. We will NOT be able to revert this action.
The creator of this room has locked it to their platform
The server closed the room due to inactivity
The server disconnected you due to inactivity
The game options received were invalid. You may need to clear all save data and restart the game.
No servers are available. Sorry! Try again later.
QuickMatch is currently unavailable. Please try joining a game instead.
There are too many games. Please try joining a game instead.
Your parental controls, or the parental controls of the players you are attempting to join do not allow you to play together.
Oops! Something went wrong processing this transaction, please restart your game. If the problem persists, please try again later.
You do not have enough of the required currency to purchase this item.
You do not own this Cosmicube.
Browse all items on the Microsoft Store
Browse all items on the PlayStation™Store

Buy Among Us Stars to unlock a whole new galaxy of customization! Spend Stars on the in-game store to get exclusive cosmetics and unique Cosmicubes. All Stars purchased here are not redeemable or usable on PlayStation® or Nintendo Switch™.
Incorrect chat mode: This room was made for {0}. Your setting is {1}.
Unable to join: Lobby contains user on block list or user blocking you. Please try another.
Steam was not properly initialized. Please restart the game from Steam and try again.
You must be logged in to your account to purchase Stars
To complete installation Among Us must download additional content. Press "Accept" to continue.

Unfortunately, purchasing Stars is not available on itch.io. However, linking your itch.io account to another platform (i.e. other PC versions) will allow you to purchase and access Stars from there! Note: Stars purchased on Nintendo Switch™ are not crossplatform, so cannot be redeemed on any other platform.
Roles add a whole new level of deception and strategy to the classic game!
Both Crewmates and Impostors can have roles assigned to them randomly, depending on the game settings chosen by the host.
The Scientist can access a portable vitals panel anywhere to check on the status of the crew.
However the panel needs to be charged, so the Scientist will need to complete tasks in order to fill the battery.
The Engineer is a Crewmate that can use vents to move around quicker, as well as catch venting Impostors in the act.
You can't stay in there forever though and it's pretty suspicious, so be careful of who you vent around...
The Guardian Angel is the ghost of a Crewmate. They can temporarily shield and protect other living Crewmates.
Time it properly and you'll be able to prevent Impostors from killing their victim. Lucky!
The Shapeshifter can change their appearance and disguise themselves as other Crewmates. Do it well to frame other Crewmates and create confusion over who the real Impostor is!
But watch out - the disguise doesn't last forever and leaves evidence behind.

Roles are customizable! Game hosts can choose how many times an Engineer can vent, Shapeshifter cooldown, etc. They can also pick the percentage chance of one of these roles occurring in the game. You can always see if a role is turned on in the game lobby settings!

Play around with the settings you like best to make your ultimate lobby, or join one and see what chaos you can cause there. We may add new roles to the game, so check back here whenever you need to! Have fun!
The Guardian Angel protected someone recently...
Access vitals at anytime.\%nl\%Complete tasks to recharge your battery.

The Scientist can access a portable vitals panel anywhere to check on the status of the crew. However the portable vitals panel needs to be charged, so the Scientist will need to complete tasks in order to fill the battery.
The Engineer is a Crewmate who can use vents to move around quicker, as well as catch venting Impostors in the act. You can't stay in there forever though, so be careful of who you vent around...
Cast protection shield around the remaining crew.

The Guardian Angel is the ghost of the first dead Crewmate. They can temporarily shield and protect other living Crewmates. Time it properly and you'll be able to prevent Impostors from killing their victim. Lucky!
Disguise yourself by morphing into other Crewmates.

The Shapeshifter can change their appearance and disguise themselves as other Crewmates. Do it well to frame other Crewmates and create confusion about who the real Impostor is. But watch out - the disguise doesn't last forever and leaves evidence behind.

We have a brand new inventory system so that you can access your items across platforms! Any items previously purchased on this platform can be transitioned over to our new inventory system ONLY ONCE.\%nl\%If this is your main Among Us account (the platform you play Among Us the most on), you can safely click on "proceed" and redeem your purchased DLC in the new inventory system. If this is an account you intend to link to your main account, you should only redeem after linking!\%nl\%\%nl\%Account ID: {0}

You are logged into a Guest Account! \%nl\%\%nl\%All XP, Pods, and Beans earned will only apply to this Guest Account. Guest Accounts are linked only to your physical device and will be lost if you switch devices. \%nl\%\%nl\%To ensure access to all of your earned currencies as well as your purchases, please open the account tab on the main menu and sign into your Among Us Account.
Failed to create a game session. Try again later.
Failed to join game session after creating it. Try again later.
Purchase and use of items are subject to the Network Terms of Service and User Agreement. This online service has been sublicensed to you by Sony Interactive Entertainment America.

Any content purchased in an in-game store will be purchased from Sony Interactive Entertainment Network Europe Limited (“SIENE”) and be subject to PlayStation™Network Terms of Service and User Agreement which is available on the PlayStation™Store. Please check usage rights for each purchase as these may differ from item to item. Unless otherwise shown, content available in any in-game store has the same age rating as the game.
Your communication settings are blocking you from joining the game. To join this game, please enable crossplay communication.
The room you joined is crossplatform, but you have disabled crossplay in your local settings
Unable to join: Server error occurred getting blocklist
Min Crewmates Alive to Unlock Vitals
Your Steam overlay must be enabled to purchase Star Bundles. Please enable your In-Game Steam overlay and then restart the game.
That Old Top Hat we Found
You will only be able to use Quick Chat while playing, and will only play with other Quick Chat users.
You will be able to use Free Chat and Quick Chat while playing, and will only play with other Free Chat users.
You must be signed in to use Free Chat. If signed in with a minor account, access the Account Tab and receive permission from a guardian to enable Free Chat.
Sending urls is not allowed! Your message was not sent.
You must be logged in to use this feature.
Among Us has a Friends List now! In order to send and receive friend or game requests, choose a unique Friend Code below.\%nl\%\%nl\%Once you select one, it cannot be changed.
Invalid Friend Code format. Enter a full Friend Code to try again (ex. SmallBeans#0001)
Failed to get your platform friends
Cannot add yourself as a friend. Sorry.
You've already sent this user a friend request
You are already friends with this user. Hurray!
Do not show this publicly unless you want everyone to know your Friend Code!
You need permission from your guardian to use this feature.
Too many lobby requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
Accounts are undergoing changes. We've temporarily restricted the ability to link existing accounts together. This will be fixed soon in a future update!
Here's a gift from the crew!\%nl\%{0}.
Error: User is on your block list or user is blocking you.
Error: The user has max friend requests and cannot receive more.
Error: You have too many outgoing friend requests.
Error: The user has a full friends list.
We just sent your parent or guardian an email requesting the additional Friends List permissions. Please have them check their email.
Your communication settings are blocking you from joining the game. To join this game, please enable communications with others.

Looks like there's a \%link="https://www.innersloth.com/merging-guest-accounts/"\%guest account\%/link\% on this device! We no longer support guest accounts and will merge all items, currencies, and experience from your guest account into this {0} account.\%nl\%\%nl\%If you share this device (computer, phone, etc.) with other people, please note that everyone who uses this device SHARES this guest account. No other users on this device will be able to merge this guest account if you proceed, and you can only merge this guest account ONCE. You will NOT be able to reallocate the items, currencies, and experience tied to this guest account again.\%nl\%\%nl\%Please confirm that you would like to merge your guest account into this {0} account.
Please visit \%link="https://accounts.innersloth.com/"\%https://accounts.innersloth.com\%/link\% to manage your account, merging, or if you have any issues.
Orange you glad to see me?

Your {0} cannot be used to create an Among Us account due to the {0}'s age restrictions.\%nl\%\%nl\%You can continue playing Among Us on this device, but for your safety certain features will be limited including: account linking, Star purchases, and items being transferred to a new device. If you have any questions, please email support@innersloth.com.
Due to {0}, your account has been banned {1}.
\%nl\%Please take this time to reflect and remember our \%link="https://www.innersloth.com/code-of-conduct/"\%Code of Conduct\%/link\%!
sharing or threat of sharing personal information or doxing
the promotion or taking part in illegal activity
sending hateful, discriminatory, or derogatory chat messages
a violation of our Code of Conduct
Thank you! Your feedback was successfully submitted.
You have submitted feedback too recently. Please try again later.
Describe in detail what you were doing that led to the issue. If you need further help, please email support@innersloth.com.
A screenshot of your current in-game screen will be taken (minus the Help window) and attached with your feedback.
User Authentication Expired. Please restart the game if this persists.

By pressing CONFIRM, you are requesting the deletion of all your Among Us data. This request will take 7-14 days and will result in the erasure of all Stars, XP, Beans, Pods, and purchased Cosmetics. Once your account is fully deleted, we cannot revert this action. Your account will function as normal until the deletion process is complete.\%nl\%\%nl\%If you encounter any errors, please contact support@innersloth.com.

By pressing CONFIRM, you will stop the process of your account deletion. If you wish to delete your account, you will need to request it again.\%nl\%\%nl\%If you encounter any errors, please contact support@innersloth.com.
Check this box to confirm that you understand this will delete this account and linked ones ({0}).
Check this box to confirm that you understand this will delete this account and linked ones.
Incorrect Version : This room was made with Among Us {0}
Survive until time runs out.\%nl\%Finishing tasks reduce the timer.
Use vents and the Danger Meter to hide!
After the timer is up, the Impostor can track you!
Kill all Crewmates within the time limit!
Act fast - you have limited vision and no access to vents.
In the final moments, you get a speed boost and tracking hints!

You can filter game searches by selecting tags from the Filters dropdown list. Filters you select will match the search results \%i\%exactly\%/i\%.\%nl\%\%nl\%Example: If you select \%b\%Casual\%/b\% and \%b\%Expert\%/b\% you will only find games tagged with both \%b\%Casual\%/b\% and \%b\%Expert\%/b\% filters.

You can tag your game with filters to help players find your game. Filters you select will match the search results \%i\%exactly\%/i\%.\%nl\%\%nl\%Example: If you select \%b\%Casual\%/b\% and \%b\%Expert\%/b\% only people who search for both \%b\%Casual\%/b\% and \%b\%Expert\%/b\% filters will see your game.
The stakes are high in this heart-stopping game mode! \%nl\%\%i\%But wait - it's not your ordinary Hide n Seek...\%/i\%

\%color=#38F25D\%\%b\%Crewmates:\%/b\%\%/color\% Complete tasks to speed up the clock, avoid the Impostor, and stay alive until the timer runs out.\%nl\%\%nl\%\%color=#FF3131\%\%b\%The Impostor:\%/b\%\%/color\% Find the Crewmates and go on a killing spree.
No social deduction here, just terrified screaming.
Master your hiding and sneaking skills in order to survive.

In this mode you can use vents and get a high-tech Danger Meter that alerts you when the Impostor is getting closer. The Impostor has a limited range of vision, so use your wits, vents, and visors to dodge them!
Impostors can't vent in this mode, so you'll need to act fast to catch your prey. It's dark out there! Luckily you have a Flashlight to help you find your next victims.

It's the finaaaal countdownnnn. In the last moments of the game, the Impostor gets a power boost - they're faster, get a special Seek map, and a directional ping to where any surviving Crewmates are.\%nl\%\%nl\%Think fast and run away strategically to win!
Use the Flashlight virtual joystick on the right side of your screen to direct your beam and kill all the Crewmates you can find!
Use your mouse to direct your Flashlight beam and kill all the Crewmates you can find!
Use the Right Stick to direct your beam and kill all the Crewmates you can find!
Use the Right Stick to direct your beam and kill all the Crewmates you can find!
Use the Right Stick to direct your beam and kill all the Crewmates you can find!
No One Can Hear You Scream
Vents Used in Hide n Seek:
Fastest Hide n Seek Crewmate Win:
Fastest Hide n Seek Impostor Win:

Looks like something went wrong. Please make sure your game is online and updated to the latest version in order to get all of the latest Among Us information and fixes.\%nl\%\%nl\%If you continue to have issues, send us a support ticket at support@innersloth.com.
There was a problem reaching the server
There was a problem finding a game code
There was a problem finding a host server
There was a problem requesting the list of games
Age verification is required before you can access Among Us. We do not store your birthdate.
For more information regarding our privacy practices, please visit:\%nl\% \%link="https://www.innersloth.com/privacy-policy/"\%https://www.innersloth.com/privacy-policy/\%/link\%
Is this date your correct birthdate?
Single Rainbow What Does it Mean

Something went wrong when finalizing your Among Us account. Please try again or continue on a guest account. All progress will be saved, but we recommend setting up an account so you can fully enjoy all of the features in Among Us.\%nl\%\%nl\%Retry account setup?
Do you have a pre-existing Among Us account? (Also known as an Epic Online Services account.)\%nl\%\%nl\%If you have played Among Us on this device before, select 'Yes'.
Uh oh! Something went wrong sending the Guardian Permissions email. Please try again or continue in offline mode.\%nl\%\%nl\%Try again?

Your account is missing a guardian email address. We need to ask your guardian (via e-mail) for permission to continue. If they say yes, you will be able to use free chat online and change your username. Ask an adult to help you with this!
Thank you for helping to keep Among Us a safe and friendly place!
Our moderation team will review the information you reported and take action as appropriate based on our Code of Conduct.

You disconnected from the server. This could be due to server issues, network issues or device issues. Check your network strength.\%nl\%\%nl\%If this happens often, your device may be too old or not reaching the minimum spec requirements. Try playing on a different device.
You disconnected from the server. This could be due to server issues or network issues. Check your network strength.
You're Going to Have a Time
Let the Floor Hit the Body
Stuck in the Middle With You
No Need to Dragon Things Out

Sabotage! The Among Us servers ran into an issue while authenticating you. Please try again.\%nl\%\%nl\%If the problem continues, please send us a \%link="https://innersloth.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new"\%support ticket\%/link\%.
We Are No Longer Horsing Around
Apply recommended settings for your game lobby.
The changes you have made to your game's settings will be overwritten by the selected preset!
The preset for balanced game settings and no roles.
The recommended settings for a lobby with roles.
The preset for the ideal Hide n Seek settings with flashlight vision turned off.
The preset for Crewmates having flashlight vision along with balanced game settings.
Edit individual settings for your game lobby.
Edit role settings for your game lobby.
I was going to the Noisemaker
Send out an alert when killed
Alert all Crewmates of your location when killed.

The Noisemaker is no ordinary Crewmate role. They don’t have an ability to use like all other roles. Instead, they automatically send out an alert when they are killed by an Impostor. The alert easily sends the Impostor into a panic. Watch your fellow Crewmates rush to the scene of the crime to catch the killer and avenge your death!
Turn invisible to sneak around or get away from a kill.

The Phantom can turn invisible to stealthily sneak up to a Crewmate or leave the scene of a crime without getting caught. They can’t kill while invisible, but they can still use ladders and ziplines. Turning invisible and vice versa creates a big smoke cloud so make sure no Crewmates are in the area! The invisibility also doesn’t last forever so make sure to time the ability right.
Track a Crewmate with your map
Plant a tracker on a Crewmate to watch\%nl\%their movements on the map.

The Tracker can see the position of a Crewmate on their minimap. They first have to be beside another Crewmate to plant the tracking device. Be careful not to look too suspicious while approaching the other Crewmate. Tracking only lasts a few seconds so make sure to choose a target carefully. Also don’t get caught staring at the minimap too long as that leaves you vulnerable to an Impostor!
The Noisemaker is no ordinary Crewmate role. They don’t have an ability to use like all other roles. Instead, they automatically send out an alert when they are killed by an Impostor.
The alert easily sends the Impostor into a panic. Watch your fellow Crewmates rush to the scene of the crime to catch the killer and avenge your death!

The Tracker can see the position of a Crewmate on their minimap. They first have to be beside another Crewmate to plant the tracking device. Be careful not to look too suspicious while approaching the other Crewmate.
Tracking only lasts a few seconds so make sure to choose a target carefully. Also don’t get caught staring at the minimap too long as that leaves you vulnerable to an Impostor!
The Phantom can turn invisible to stealthily sneak up to a Crewmate or leave the scene of a crime without getting caught. They can’t kill while invisible, but they can still use ladders and ziplines.
Turning invisible and vice versa creates a big smoke cloud so make sure no Crewmates are in the area! The invisibility also doesn’t last forever so make sure to time the ability right.
Please wait one minute to start
Got a Bite on the Line
The Better to See You With
Let Me See What You Have
Customize your lobby using the settings below.
There are Impostors blending in as Crewmates!\%nl\%Find who is suspicious and vote them out.
The ultimate game of cat and mouse.\%nl\%Don't get caught by the Seeker!
The maximum amount of players that can join the lobby.
The server region in which to create the game in.
Players on any platform can join the lobby.
Only players on the same platform as you can join.
The language to be used for in-game discussions.
The Skeld: a medium-sized ship with multiple rooms\%nl\%and corridors. Great for learning the ropes.
MIRA HQ: a small map with many long corridors\%nl\%and fully connected vent system.
Polus: this planetary outpost is a medium-sized map\%nl\%featuring indoor and outdoor areas.
The Airship: a large map with tons of different rooms to hide\%nl\%or be cornered by an Impostor.
The Fungle: a large island with a sunny beach,\%nl\%mysterious jungle, and elevated highlands.
You are creating a lobby with the following settings:
Customize the settings for the in-game chat window.
Are you sure you want to clear all your selected filters?
Filter by one or more maps.
Filter by the number of Impostors.
Filter by whether roles are added to the lobby or not.
Filter by the character movement speed.
The length of time an Impostor must wait before killing again.
How long players have to vote in meetings.
When On, all players can see when certain Tasks are being completed.
When On, meetings don't show who voted for who.
When On, it's revealed if an ejected Crewmate is an Impostor.
Show lobbies across all platforms or only from your platform.
Narrow your search with the filters below.
When On, players have a light that can be pointed in different directions.
The length of the first phase of Hide n Seek.
The length of the final phase of Hide n Seek.
The number of times Crewmates can vent.
Add a tag to appeal to players of a specific skill level.
That's a Bit of a Breach
My Beret or the Highway - Black
My Beret or the Highway - Blue
My Beret or the Highway - Pink
And You Have My Bow - Red
And You Have My Bow - Pink
Your account lacks permissions to access the game's online features.
Your account's user generated content settings are blocking you from accessing the game's online features.
Your account's communication settings are blocking you from creating online games.
Your account's communication settings are blocking you from searching online games.
Your account's communication settings are blocking you from joining online games.
As soon as there's a murder, I can start investigating...
The Detective is a Crewmate who excels in solving murders! With their Notes, they can record important info about each kill.
The Detective can then Interrogate other Crewmates to learn their whereabouts at the time of the kill. Connect the dots and find the killer!
The Viper uses a deadly acid to kill Crewmates. Bodies slowly dissolve in three stages before fully disappearing.
A clever Viper ensures all their kills are never found. Use sabotages to your maximum advantage!
Crest of the Best Travel Companion
